mnemonics.title: SR Flip-Flop States
mnemonics.content: Same Input Restriction: S=R=1 is forbidden (SR = Same = Restricted)

acronyms.usage: Remember as 'Delay' flip-flop - delays input by one clock cycle

visualTips.visualization: Imagine clock edge as camera shutter - captures input exactly at transition moment

analogies.analogy: Like a coin-operated locker: needs correct input (coin) AND trigger (turning handle) to store/retrieve items
